category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Nepal market under NBSM / NS conformity.

title.en: China-to-Nepal LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具出口尼泊尔：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具出口尼泊爾：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Nepal NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology) NS certification, NS/IEC safety standards (NS/IEC 60598, 62560, 62471), photobiological safety, energy efficiency programmes, and NTA radio type approval for smart luminaires, versus Chinese GB 30255 / GB 7000 standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与尼泊尔 NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）NS 认证、NS/IEC 安全标准（NS/IEC 60598、62560、62471）、光生物安全、能效计划及智能灯具 NTA 无线电型号核准的差距对照，与中国 GB 30255 / GB 7000 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與尼泊爾 NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）NS 認證、NS/IEC 安全標準（NS/IEC 60598、62560、62471）、光生物安全、能效計劃及智能燈具 NTA 無線電型號核准的差距對照，與中國 GB 30255 / GB 7000 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and in-country importers of record should verify current Nepal NBSM mandatory certification scope, applicable NS / NS-IEC standards, energy programme requirements, and NTA radio type-approval obligations with qualified professionals and the relevant Nepali authorities before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及在地进口商在出货或销售前，应与合格专业人士及尼泊尔相关主管部门核验现行尼泊尔 NBSM 强制认证范围、适用 NS / NS-IEC 标准、能效计划要求及 NTA 无线电型号核准义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及在地進口商在出貨或銷售前，應與合格專業人士及尼泊爾相關主管部門核驗現行尼泊爾 NBSM 強制認證範圍、適用 NS / NS-IEC 標準、能效計劃要求及 NTA 無線電型號核准義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Nepal works through an in-country importer of record and must align with NBSM (Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology), which operates the NS certification / conformity scheme and adopts NS standards that mirror IEC. Core items: electrical safety to NS/IEC 60598-1 (and NS/IEC 62560 for self-ballasted lamps); LED driver safety to NS/IEC 61347-2-13; photobiological safety to NS/IEC 62471 where applied; EMC broadly per CISPR 15 where adopted; and energy efficiency handled through Nepal's energy programmes rather than an EU-style binding Ecodesign regulation. Smart luminaires with wireless functions need NTA (Nepal Telecommunications Authority) radio type approval. Nepal is landlocked, so goods route via Kolkata / Vizag in India; grid is 230 V, 50 Hz. Importantly, Nepal has no EU-style horizontal RoHS / REACH-SVHC regime — substance restriction is not a standalone mandatory market-access gate the way it is in the EU. None of these Nepal obligations are covered by existing Chinese CCC certification, which is not recognised for the Nepali market.
answer_first.zh: 出口尼泊尔的中国 LED 灯具制造商需通过在地进口商运作，并对接 NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）——其运行 NS 认证/合格评定方案，所采用 NS 标准对标 IEC。核心事项：电气安全对应 NS/IEC 60598-1（自镇流灯泡对应 NS/IEC 62560）；LED 驱动器安全对应 NS/IEC 61347-2-13；光生物安全在采用时对应 NS/IEC 62471；EMC 在采用时大致依 CISPR 15；能效则通过尼泊尔能效计划处理，而非欧盟式具约束力的生态设计法规。带无线功能的智能灯具需 NTA（尼泊尔电信管理局）无线电型号核准。尼泊尔为内陆国，货物经印度加尔各答/维萨卡帕特南转运；电网为 230 V、50 Hz。重要的是，尼泊尔无欧盟式横向 RoHS / REACH-SVHC 制度——物质限制并非像欧盟那样独立的强制市场准入门槛。上述尼泊尔义务均不被现有中国 CCC 认证所涵盖，CCC 在尼泊尔市场不被认可。
answer_first.zht: 出口尼泊爾的中國 LED 燈具製造商需通過在地進口商運作，並對接 NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）——其運行 NS 認證/合格評定方案，所採用 NS 標準對標 IEC。核心事項：電氣安全對應 NS/IEC 60598-1（自鎮流燈泡對應 NS/IEC 62560）；LED 驅動器安全對應 NS/IEC 61347-2-13；光生物安全在採用時對應 NS/IEC 62471；EMC 在採用時大致依 CISPR 15；能效則通過尼泊爾能效計劃處理，而非歐盟式具約束力的生態設計法規。帶無線功能的智能燈具需 NTA（尼泊爾電信管理局）無線電型號核准。尼泊爾為內陸國，貨物經印度加爾各答/維薩卡帕特南轉運；電網為 230 V、50 Hz。重要的是，尼泊爾無歐盟式橫向 RoHS / REACH-SVHC 制度——物質限制並非像歐盟那樣獨立的強制市場准入門檻。上述尼泊爾義務均不被現有中國 CCC 認證所涵蓋，CCC 在尼泊爾市場不被認可。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly, plus on any NBSM mandatory-product-list update, NS/IEC standard adoption change, Nepal energy programme change, or NTA radio rule change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. NBSM mandatory certification scope and the list of adopted NS/IEC standards must be re-verified against current NBSM notices on each review cycle. Nepal's absence of a horizontal RoHS/REACH-SVHC regime must be re-checked before each publication.
